Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
iTHINK Financial Amphitheatre
West Palm Beach, FL
Previous Names:
Coral Sky Amphitheatre (Changed after 1999)
MARS Music Amphitheatre (Changed after 2002)
Coral Sky Amphitheatre (Changed after 2003)
Sound Advice Amphitheatre (Changed after 2007)
Cruzan Amphitheatre (Changed after 2015)
Coral Sky Amphitheatre (Changed after 2015)
Perfect Vodka Amphitheatre at the South Florida Fairgrounds (Changed after 2017)
Coral Sky Amphitheatre at the South Florida Fairgrounds (Changed after 2019)
Seating Capacity: 19000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 43
  DMB  (43)

Longest Performance:
07.20.13 - Two Step (22:10)

Song Liberations
  7.12.08 – Help Myself (after 1407 days)
  7.30.10 – Good Good Time (after 2127 days)
  7.31.10 – Last Stop, The (after 1418 days)
  7.31.10 – Cortez the Killer (after 1379 days)
  7.27.19 – I'll Back You Up (after 1487 days)
  8.21.22 – Cry Freedom (after 2178 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Between January 1 and April 8, 2003, Mars Music Amphitheatre changed its name back to Coral Sky Amphitheatre until Tweeter Home Entertainment Group bought the rights to name the venue Sound Advice Amphitheatre. Since 2007, the amphitheater has been named after Cruzan rum. In February 2015, the venue again reverted back to being called Coral Sky Amphitheatre until it found a new corporate sponsor, Perfect Vodka, on July 27, 2015.

601-7 Sansburys Way
West Palm Beach, FL 33411

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Loving Wings (7.5.02)
